use_cases: Display featured and regular blog posts in an asymmetric grid layout
Showcase article previews with metadata like views, read time, and ratings
Create a blog listing page with category filtering visualization
Build a content marketing section for websites and landing pages
ai_summary: A responsive blog posts grid component featuring an asymmetric layout with one large featured card and multiple smaller supporting cards. Supports blog metadata including view counts, read times, ratings, and categories. Includes decorative background typography and hover states for enhanced visual hierarchy. Designed for content-heavy pages like blogs, news sites, and marketing sections.
